'''Tom Forber''' is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for the [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Super League]].

He has spent time on loan or dual registration from Wigan at [[Wakefield Trinity]] and [[Castleford Tigers]] in the Super League, at [[Newcastle Thunder]], [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven]], [[Widnes Vikings]], [[Barrow Raiders]] and [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]] in the [[RFL Championship]], and at Oldham in [[RFL League One|League 1]].

==Playing career==
===Wigan Warriors===
In 2022, Forber made his [[Super League]] debut for the [[Wigan Warriors]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/62661463|title=Super League: Hull KR 38-28 Wigan Warriors - Home side hold on despite late flurry|work=BBC Sport }}</ref>

On 12 October 2024, Forber played in Wigan's 9–2 [[2024 Super League Grand Final]] victory over Hull Kingston Rovers.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/live/2024/oct/12/wigan-v-hull-kr-super-league-grand-final-2024-live-score-updates?page=with:block-670aaacb8f087ed1d5a8a350/|title=Wigan v Hull KR: Super League Grand Final 2024 – as it happened|website=www.theguardian.com}}</ref>

In July 2025, Forber signed a new four-year deal with the club.<ref>https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c0j458gv40po</ref>

====Barrow Raiders (loan)====
On 27 March 2024, it was reported that he had signed for [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on short-term loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Wigan Warriors|date=27 Mar 2024|accessdate=16 Apr 2024|title=TOM FORBER WILL THIS WEEK JOIN BARROW RAIDERS ON LOAN|url=https://wiganwarriors.com/blog/2024/03/27/tom-forber-joins-barrow-on-two-week-deal/}}</ref>

====Oldham RLFC (DR)====
On 16 April 2025, it was reported that he had signed for [[Oldham RLFC]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on [[RFL dual registration|DR]] loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=16 Apr 2025|author=Callum Walker|title=Wigan Warriors duo head out on dual-registration|url=https://www.totalrl.com/wigan-warriors-duo-head-out-on-dual-registration/}}</ref>

==== Castleford Tigers (loan) ====
On 24 March 2026, [[Castleford Tigers]] announced the signing of Forber on a one-month loan deal.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Olawumi |first=Ben |date=24 March 2026 |title=Wigan Warriors hooker Tom Forber seals Super League loan switch as debut confirmed |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/tom-forber-joins-castleford-on-loan-24-03-2026 |access-date=20 April 2026 |website=Love Rugby League}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date=24 March 2026 |title=Tigers bring in Wigan hooker Forber on loan |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cm2972me11do |access-date=20 April 2026 |website=BBC Sport}}</ref> He made his debut in Castleford's round 6 victory against [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]], earning a place in the Super League Team of the Week.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Tomlinson |first=Daniel |date=27 March 2026 |title=Castleford Tigers pride outlined as debutant praised and ex-Leeds Rhinos man shows support |url=https://www.alloutrugbyleague.co.uk/news/castleford-tigers-pride-outlined-debutant-1760819 |access-date=20 April 2026 |website=All Out Rugby League}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date=30 March 2026 |title=Birthday Round Team of the Week (Round 6) |url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/article/5950/birthday-round-team-of-the-week-(round-6) |access-date=20 April 2026 |website=Super League}}</ref> After his second appearance, Forber was recalled to parent club Wigan.<ref name="LRL Forber Thewlis recall">{{Cite web |last=Shaw |first=Matthew |date=5 April 2026 |title=Ryan Carr ready to wield axe on Castleford Tigers 'victims' after latest defeat |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/ryan-carr-castleford-tigers-victims |access-date=20 April 2026 |website=Love Rugby League}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |last=Smith |first=Peter |date=16 April 2026 |title=Castleford Tigers loan decision made for Wigan Warriors game as Ryan Carr 'hopeful' over full-back search |url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/castleford-tigers-loan-decision-made-for-wigan-warriors-game-as-ryan-carr-hopeful-over-full-back-search-6578408 |access-date=20 April 2026 |website=Yorkshire Evening Post}}</ref>
